CustomField.description: Text formula that constructs a sentence explaining the relationship between the two Contacts
CustomField.formula:
IF( $Setup.npe4__Relationship_Settings__c.npe4__Reciprocal_Method__c = "Value Inversion" && CONTAINS(TEXT(npe4__Type__c), $Label.npe4__Relationship_Split),
TEXT(npe4__RelatedContact__r.Salutation) + " " + npe4__RelatedContact__r.FirstName + " " + npe4__RelatedContact__r.LastName + " " + IF(ISPICKVAL(npe4__Status__c, "Former"), 'was', $Label.npe4__Relationship_Explanation_Connector) + " " + TEXT(npe4__Contact__r.Salutation) + " " + npe4__Contact__r.FirstName + " " + npe4__Contact__r.LastName + "'s " + RIGHT(TEXT(npe4__Type__c), LEN(TEXT(npe4__Type__c))-FIND($Label.npe4__Relationship_Split,TEXT(npe4__Type__c))),
TEXT(npe4__RelatedContact__r.Salutation) + " " + npe4__RelatedContact__r.FirstName + " " + npe4__RelatedContact__r.LastName + " " + IF(ISPICKVAL(npe4__Status__c, "Former"), 'was', $Label.npe4__Relationship_Explanation_Connector) + " " + TEXT(npe4__Contact__r.Salutation) + " " + npe4__Contact__r.FirstName + " " + npe4__Contact__r.LastName + "'s " + TEXT(npe4__Type__c)
)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Text formula that constructs a sentence explaining the relationship between the two Contacts
CustomField.label: Relationship Explanation
